cluster.description: A cluster definition representing a compute or virtualization cluster

cluster_group.description: Group the cluster belongs to (must correspond to a defined cluster group)

cluster_type.description: Type of cluster (must correspond to a defined cluster type)

devices.description: List of device names that are members of this cluster

location.description: Location where the cluster resides (must correspond to a defined location)

description: Cluster configuration schema for Nautobot virtualization organization
title: UnderStack Clusters
